summary: Fix blank end-user GUI caused by missing Socket.IO browser client placeholder and cascading frontend bootstrap errors.
root_cause: static/vendor/socket.io.min.js was a placeholder, so window.io was undefined. 0001_core_socket_crypto.js then threw before defining socket/currentUser, causing later chat modules to fail and leaving rooms, friends, groups, presence, and missed-message panels unpopulated.
checks: for f in static/js/chat_parts/*.js static/vendor/socket.io.min.js; do node --check \"$f\"; done
